steps.title: Use the recipient clue
steps.content: The sentence contrasts a prize given to one person with a prize awarded when work is attributed to two or three people. The blank must describe one award being shared by multiple recipients.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched meanings
steps.content: A describes ceremony, not sharing. B wrongly suggests unwillingness, and D refers to applying something to the past. The needed word means shared together by multiple people. The answer is C.
